subcodes.first_line: Remember ye the servants of God, that they may be drawn unto that station wherein the Spirit proclaimeth: "Verily, there is no God but Him, the Mighty." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری عباد الله لیجذبهم الی مقام فیه ینطق الروح انه لا اله الا هو العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action
